pages.title: Mutation Details
pages.text: Notes:$(br)One $(l:herbology/grassper)Grassper$(/l) needs to hold a $(l:artifacts/misc/attuned_stone#charged)Charged Attuned Stone$(/l), one a $(l:resources/tongue_of_dog)Tongue of Dog$(/l) and the other two $(l:artifacts/misc/mutandis#extremis)Mutandis Extremis$(/l).
